marketCap.label: Market Cap
marketCap.description: Total market value of all outstanding shares

volume.label: Volume
volume.description: Number of shares traded in the last session

priceChangePercentage1d.label: 1D Price Change
priceChangePercentage1d.description: Price change over the last trading day

priceChangePercentage7d.label: 7D Price Change
priceChangePercentage7d.description: Price change over the last 7 days

priceChangePercentage1m.label: 1M Price Change
priceChangePercentage1m.description: Price change over the last 30 days

trailingPE.label: P/E
trailingPE.description: Price-to-Earnings ratio — current share price divided by earnings per share over the trailing 12 months

dividendYield.label: Dividend Yield
dividendYield.description: Annual dividend payment as a percentage of the current share price

priceToBook.label: P/B
priceToBook.description: Price-to-Book ratio — current share price divided by book value per share

operatingProfitMargin.label: Op. Margin
operatingProfitMargin.description: Operating income as a percentage of revenue, measuring core business profitability

revenueTTM.label: Revenue (TTM)
revenueTTM.description: Total revenue over the trailing twelve months

grossProfitTTM.label: Gross Profit (TTM)
grossProfitTTM.description: Revenue minus cost of goods sold over the trailing twelve months

earningsTTM.label: Earnings (TTM)
earningsTTM.description: Net income over the trailing twelve months

totalAssets.label: Total Assets
totalAssets.description: Sum of all current and non-current assets on the balance sheet

totalLiabilities.label: Total Liabilities
totalLiabilities.description: Sum of all current and long-term obligations on the balance sheet

fiftyTwoWeekHigh.label: 52W High
fiftyTwoWeekHigh.description: Highest share price in the past 52 weeks

fiftyTwoWeekLow.label: 52W Low
fiftyTwoWeekLow.description: Lowest share price in the past 52 weeks

ebitdaTTM.label: EBITDA (TTM)
ebitdaTTM.description: Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization over the trailing twelve months

holdersRevenueTTM.label: Holders Revenue (TTM)
holdersRevenueTTM.description: Revenue distributed to shareholders via buybacks and dividends over the trailing twelve months

treasury.label: Treasury / Balance Sheet
treasury.description: Cash and cash equivalents plus short-term investments on the balance sheet
